notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-037 is a metadata-only State transition enforcement pack: it accepts only RP00.P02.M07.S08 Test And Golden Case Set Secondary workflow path results, requires allow_metadata_only with fixed metadata permission and audit refs, and rejects state-transition bypass, audit writes, runtime permission, AuthZ evaluator, permission engine, security trimming, test execution, golden fixture generation or persistence, runtime route, service execution, database/storage/product-state write, real-data/secret, catalog mutation, unit-test-contract mutation, source completion, invalid transitions, and unknown truthy claims.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence finalization failed only because CP00-037 evidence files did not exist yet.
The completed read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-037; raw verdict was pass, raw findings were P0=0/P1=0/P2=0/P3=0.

evidence_summary.implementation: RP00.P02.M07.S09 State transition enforcement result fields, policy, prechecker, service function, validators, fixture mirror, README entry, contract ledger row, and RP00 validator coverage were added.
evidence_summary.tests: Control-plane service tests include policy binding, metadata state transition receipt, no-write drift rejection, unsafe claim fail-closed coverage, prechecker no-write handoff, wrong source rejection, invalid transition rejection, and fixture mirror checks.
evidence_summary.hermes_evidence: H00 command ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate and spec_requirement_validate are represented and finalized after review adjudication.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed once before production_ready; no P0/P1/P2/P3 findings were reported.
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains outside this metadata-only S09 State transition enforcement pack; the explicit next goal boundary is RP00.P02.M07.S10 Idempotency key handling.

preliminary_expected_failures.summary: Pre-evidence RP00 validation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-037 evidence files did not exist yet.
